steps.name: Expand initial state schema for Waves 2-4
steps.description: Add research_summary, discrimination_table, volumes (technical/management/cost with status, current_draft, review_comments, iterations), and open_review_items to initial proposal state. Expand waves dict to include entries for Waves 2 through 9.
criteria: New proposal state includes research_summary with empty findings list
New proposal state includes discrimination_table with empty items list
New proposal state includes volumes with technical, management, and cost entries
New proposal state includes open_review_items as empty list
Waves dict in new proposal state includes entries for Waves 0 through 9

steps.name: Expand WAVE_NAMES to all 10 waves
steps.description: Fix WAVE_NAMES dict in status_service.py to cover Waves 0-9 with correct names per spec. StatusService handles unknown wave numbers gracefully.
criteria: Status displays correct names for all 10 waves (0 through 9)
When status requested for undefined wave, system displays default label without raising error
Missing wave entries in state produce progress with zero completed

steps.name: Wave ordering rules for Waves 2-4
steps.description: Add wave-3-requires-research and wave-4-requires-outline rules to pes-config.json. Add new condition keys (requires_research_approval, requires_outline_approval) handled by the rule evaluator.
criteria: Wave 2 blocked when strategy brief not approved; allowed when approved
Wave 3 blocked when research not approved; allowed when approved
Wave 4 blocked when outline not approved; allowed when approved
Skipping waves is blocked with prerequisite guidance message
Block decisions recorded in audit log with rule ID and timestamp

steps.name: Research domain models
steps.description: Value objects for research findings: technical landscape, patent landscape, prior award analysis, market analysis (TAM/SAM/SOM), commercialization pathway, TRL refinement. ResearchSummary aggregates all findings.
criteria: Research finding captures category, content, and evidence source
Research summary aggregates six research categories
All domain objects are pure Python with no infrastructure imports

steps.name: ResearchService generation
steps.description: Driving port that generates research findings from strategy brief context. Covers all six research categories. Handles missing TPOC data gracefully.
criteria: Research findings generated covering all six categories
Generation without strategy brief raises descriptive error
Generation without TPOC data proceeds with caveat noted

steps.name: Research checkpoint lifecycle
steps.description: Approve/revise/skip checkpoint for research findings. Approval records timestamp and unlocks Wave 3. Revision regenerates incorporating feedback.
criteria: Approval records timestamp in state and unlocks Wave 3
Revision regenerates findings incorporating feedback text
Approve or revise without generated findings raises error
Skip marks research as deferred and unlocks Wave 3

steps.name: Discrimination and outline domain models
steps.description: Value objects for discrimination (discriminator item with category, claim, evidence) and outline (section with compliance mapping, page budget, figure placeholders, thesis statement).
criteria: Discriminator item captures category, claim, and evidence citation
Outline section maps compliance items and assigns page budget
Page budget collection validates total against a limit
All domain objects are pure Python with no infrastructure imports

steps.name: DiscriminationService with iteration
steps.description: Driving port generating discrimination table from strategy brief, compliance matrix, and research findings. Supports feedback iteration and TPOC insight integration.
criteria: Each discriminator captures competitive advantage claim with supporting evidence
Each discriminator cites supporting evidence
TPOC insights incorporated when available
Revision incorporates human feedback and regenerates table
Generation without approved research raises descriptive error

steps.name: OutlineService generation
steps.description: Driving port generating proposal outline from discrimination table and compliance matrix. Assigns page budgets, maps all compliance items, defines figure placeholders.
criteria: Every compliance item mapped to at least one outline section
Section page budgets total to solicitation page limit or fewer
Unmapped compliance items flagged with item IDs listed
Generation without approved discrimination table raises error

steps.name: Outline checkpoint lifecycle
steps.description: Approve/revise/skip checkpoint for proposal outline. Approval records timestamp and unlocks Wave 4. Revision regenerates incorporating feedback.
criteria: Approval records timestamp in state and unlocks Wave 4
Revision regenerates outline incorporating feedback text
Approve without generated outline raises descriptive error
Skip marks outline as deferred and unlocks Wave 4

steps.name: Draft and review domain models
steps.description: Value objects for drafting (section draft with compliance traceability, word count, iteration tracking) and review (scorecard with findings by location/severity, reviewer persona scores, red team findings).
criteria: Draft section tracks compliance items, word count, and iteration round
Review finding captures location, severity, and suggestion
Review scorecard aggregates findings with strengths and weaknesses
All domain objects are pure Python with no infrastructure imports

steps.name: DraftService with compliance tracking
steps.description: Driving port orchestrating section-by-section drafting from approved outline. Tracks iterations, checks compliance coverage per section, monitors page budget usage.
criteria: Section drafted addressing mapped compliance items
Draft word count reported against section page budget
Section exceeding page budget produces warning
Unaddressed compliance items in a section flagged by item ID
Drafting without approved outline raises descriptive error
Attempting to draft an undefined section returns guidance on available sections

steps.name: ReviewService with iteration loop and checkpoint
steps.description: Driving port generating review scorecards, running persona-based evaluation, producing red team findings. Manages review iteration loop (max 2 cycles then escalate) and Wave 4 completion checkpoint.
criteria: Review produces scorecard with findings by location and severity
Re-review tracks which prior findings were addressed
Third review cycle escalates unresolved findings
Full draft review verifies all compliance items addressed
Review without existing draft raises descriptive error

validation.revision_notes: 3 AC coupling findings resolved per reviewer suggestions
